lines: > Oh... hello Capu, I didn't notice you.
> I guess you heard it. I don't know what to do.
I heard the fight. Your father won't listen. If you want to look for ???, I'm with you. But we'll have to sneak in at night.
Meet me at the exit gate when the sun goes down.
> Oh Capu, you are still here. Any news?
Yes, but they are not good...
Krage - is missing. They tell he vanished from the village and nobody knows when or how.
> That has never happened. He has to be somewhere. I will look for clues.
Maybe your father can help? After all he is-
> Stop. We are not asking for my father help.
Hello Korato! I'm glad I caught you. You're on your way to the Blacksmith?
I heard some rumors that something bad has happened, so stay alert. I'll go check the village a bit and update you.
> Fine, but I need to see the Blacksmith before.
